The market is coiling in a sideways regime, punishing impatient hands while the smart money accumulates in the shadows.
narrative.headline: Fear Echoes the August Bottom as Smart Money Loads

next_move.outlook: The narrative arc points toward a resolution of this anxiety-driven compression, with the historical pattern suggesting a breakout from the sideways regime once the current fear subsides, but the coil can persist longer than anyone expects.
